domain: Greek bouzouki tetrachordo (4-course Greek lute; CFAD tuning; 8 strings in 4 paired courses; lower 2 courses octave-paired C3/C4 + F3/F4; upper 2 unison A3/A3 + D4/D4; coupled-string phase coherence enhances tone)
specific_mechanism: BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE: 4-course paired-attention-head coupling for KV cache compression + tetrachord-mode phase-coherent stereo-pair lookup. (1) Group 4 attention heads into 4 pair-courses: 2 octave-pair courses + 2 unison-pair courses. (2) Octave-pair (heads h1+h2 paired): share K_pair but V_h1, V_h2 scaled at different magnitudes (2x scaling = octave). (3) Unison-pair (heads h3+h4 paired): share both K and V (paired duplicate). (4) Phase-coherence per-pair: outputs averaged with phase-locked weight α_pair = cos(φ_pair) where φ_pair is learned phase offset. (5) Reduces KV cache memory by ~50% via course-pair sharing while preserving 4-mode tetrachord harmonic structure. (6) Differs from MLA single-latent shared by 4-course pair-structured K-share-with-V-scale.
llm_application: BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE 4-course paired attention-head coupling + octave-pair K-share V-scale-2x + unison-pair K-V duplicate + phase-coherent per-pair output average. Differs from R426 HAKA-PHASE-LOCK (single cohort). R447 MBUTI-HOCKET-DECODE (phase-offset speculative). R452 HAENYEO-PHASE-DIVE (per-expert breath-hold). R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (3-head drone+2-melody — closest, but 3-head not 4-course pair-coupled). R094 PHYLLOTAXIS (golden-angle). Differs from DeepSeek MLA ACL 2025 (single shared latent — closest, but no 4-course pair structure). CLA 2405.12981 (cross-layer pair, not within-layer course-pair). MTLA (temporal latent). GQA (group query — closest, but no octave-V-scaling). Differs by 4-COURSE PAIR-COUPLING (2 OCTAVE + 2 UNISON) + V-SCALE-2X OCTAVE + PHASE-LOCKED PAIR-OUTPUT AVERAGING.
novelty_claim: MLA + CLA + MTLA + GQA cover KV pair-sharing paradigm. BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE adds (a) 4-course pair structure with mixed octave+unison + (b) V-scale-2x octave-pair + (c) phase-locked output average. Recombination — borderline lookup.
